embeds.title: How To Beat a Gacha Game
embeds.description:
What does it even mean to beat a gacha? Here I give a taste of my perspective on gachas, and why I think about them the way I do.

What gachas can you beat?

Music Used:
Roland - Library Of Ruina
Paintress - Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
Saint of the Bud - Elden Ring
Morta Mima - Absolum

Gacha | Endg

but aside from that yeah, Tawil and 24 have some synergy and Pandia is often played with Tawil as well for reasons that are honestly beyond my understanding

also what e2 means?
Dupes
oh
okay
e stands for enlightenment, which is this game's term for dupes
Test it and find out lol

also, Morimens is in general a very dupe-heavy game, with a lot of units intending anywhere between one and seven dupes, three to e3 which is where the "additional" effects are all unlocked, then another 4 for Over-Exalt which is basically just a stronger ult at double the cost... kinda, and at e3 + 12 so 16 total copies you unlock AA, which is a Rouse buff. The Rouse buff can be *very* strong in some cases, but +12 is kind of hard to reach without heavy investment in a character or using the strongest card of all
well, except on standard characters. it's not that hard to reach +12 on standard characters

it has +1 Arithmetica, which is the resource you use to play cards. It's the only wod in the game with that effect and that makes it fairly useful in a lot of teams

Alright, fair. I'll try this team out then, thank you :)

aigis has vulnerable for your burst turn and a stun on her devour to help you get a free turn, winkle is able to apply weakness to keep you alive and charge exalts + has decent early shielding, saya applies corrosion for your burst, jenkins is able to convert arith into her mouse attack multi hit card and then trigger all the corrosion for massive damage + the fact that you can use ultra turn as another free setup turn if you find yourself in trouble
if you do end up not enjoying the team imo liz posse makes her much much smoother to play i understand the awkwardness tbh
ty ty 🥹

your basic burst will be jenkins X cost card, saya corrosion 0 cost card, draw the multihit, annihilate (click the purple circle on your ultra bar) use the 1 insight to play your multi hit card, watch enemy suffer
also dont burst in ultra turn use as a safety net not an aggressive tool
